playgrounds.title: Todo Actions — 9 approches sans layout shift
playgrounds.description: 9 patterns interactifs pour révéler les actions d'un item au hover, sans jamais changer la taille des blocs ni décaler le layout : gradient overlay, colonne droite, popover ⋯, hauteur fixe, pill flottante, slide depuis droite, inline après texte, scale reveal, menu contextuel.
playgrounds.prompt: 9 hover action patterns for todo items, zero layout shift

playgrounds.title: Icon Explorer — 50k+ icons
playgrounds.description: Search 50,000+ icons across 10 libraries (Lucide, Phosphor, Tabler, Material Design, Heroicons, Bootstrap, Remix, Font Awesome, Simple Icons…). Click to copy, multi-select to copy a group. Color picker, size previews, favorites with folders.
playgrounds.prompt: Icon search playground with Iconify API, 10 libraries, click-to-copy, multi-select, color picker, favorites with folders.

playgrounds.title: Vector Art — 300 Custom Illustrations
playgrounds.description: Hand-crafted SVG art. 6 styles (Abstract, Organic, Geometric, Minimal, Fluid, Retro) × 50 variations each.
playgrounds.prompt: Create 300 beautiful custom SVG vector art illustrations across 6 categories (Abstract, Organic, Geometric, Minimal, Fluid, Retro). Each category has 50 variations with different color palettes. Use gradients, curves, and thoughtful design. All SVG-based, selectable, copyable IDs.

playgrounds.title: Background Images — 200 Variations
playgrounds.description: 200 selectable vector backgrounds (8 themes × 25 variations). Select, copy IDs, paste here.
playgrounds.prompt: Create a mega-playground with 200 vector background variations across 8 themes (mountains, water, forest, sunset, circuit, particles, organic, aurora). Each theme has 25 seeded variations. Users can filter by theme, select variations with checkboxes, copy selected IDs to clipboard, and paste them in chat for analysis.

playgrounds.title: Background Images — Zen todo app
playgrounds.description: 6 custom vector art backgrounds + royalty-free sources. Nature inspired with subtle tech overlays, light/dark modes, and glassmorphism-ready.
playgrounds.prompt: Create a playground showcasing 6 vector art background options for a zen todo app. Mix nature themes (mountains, water, plants, forest) with subtle technology elements (grids, circuits, nodes). Include light/dark mode toggle, app mockups with glassmorphism, and curated links to royalty-free image sources (Unsplash, Pexels, Pixabay, etc.).

playgrounds.title: Drag & Drop — 3 feedback styles
playgrounds.description: Compare 3 approaches for drag and drop feedback: animated gap, orange arrow indicator, and ghost preview.
playgrounds.prompt: Create a comparison playground showing 3 different drag & drop feedback patterns: gap animé (Notion/Trello style), flèche orange (arrow + line), and ghost preview. Use vibrant colors, smooth animations, and a dark gradient background.

playgrounds.title: Dropzone Styles — 10 variations
playgrounds.description: Explore 10 different visual styles for drop zones, from subtle dashed borders to glowing neon outlines.
playgrounds.prompt: Generate 10 unique dropzone placeholder styles: dashed subtle, solid glow, bright fill, gradient pulse, white ghost, left bar, neon outline, dotted with label, glass orange, breathing animation. Each with drag & drop functionality.

playgrounds.title: Low-poly backgrounds — 2 palettes
playgrounds.description: Dynamic low-poly background generator with warm geography and northern lights themed palettes.
playgrounds.prompt: Create a low-poly background generator with 2 palettes: Géo Chaud (warm reds/oranges/greens) and Aurore Boréale (violet/blue/cyan). Show light and dark variants over a todo app mockup with glassmorphism effects.

playgrounds.title: Priority Display — 20 styles
playgrounds.description: 20 different visual approaches to display task priority levels and section headers when sorting by priority.
playgrounds.prompt: Create 20 unique variations for displaying task priority indicators and section headers: colored dots, badges, bars, accents, gradients, icons, pills, outlines, glows, text-only, rings, stripes, corners, animations, and glassmorphism styles. Show each with sample tasks and section titles.

playgrounds.title: Hamburger Icons — 40 variantes
playgrounds.description: 40 variantes d'icônes hamburger animées open/close. Barres, cercles, flèches, SVG, dot grid, gradient, glow, spin, bounce...
playgrounds.prompt: 40 hamburger menu icon variants animated open/close

playgrounds.title: Modal — Glass Variants
playgrounds.description: Exploration de styles glassmorphism pour les modals.

playgrounds.title: Settings Icon
playgrounds.description: Exploration d'icônes et styles pour le bouton de settings.

playgrounds.title: Section Titles
playgrounds.description: Styles de titres de section pour la vue jour.

playgrounds.title: Add Screen — 100 concepts
playgrounds.description: 100 innovative approaches for the add-task screen: command palette, progressive disclosure, spatial, conversational, step-by-step, minimal, gesture, hybrid, immersive, and experimental.
playgrounds.prompt: Generate 100 different add-task screen concepts organized in 10 categories (Command, Progressive, Spatial, Conversationnel, Steps, Minimal, Gesture, Hybrid, Immersif, Expérimental). Each concept is an interactive mockup with dark glass aesthetic. Filterable navigation bar.
